documentation.value: Writes the text representation of the specified value, followed by a line terminator, to the standard output stream.
The value to write. Can be a String, Integer, or any object.
Reads the next line of characters from the standard input stream.

signatures.label: MsgBox(prompt As Object, buttons As MsgBoxStyle, title As String) As MsgBoxResult

The message displayed in the dialog box
Numeric expression for button types and icon: `MsgBoxStyle.OkOnly`, `MsgBoxStyle.YesNo`, etc.
The string displayed in the title bar of the dialog

The string displayed in the title bar
